title: thelypteris afra
intro: Thelypteris afra, also known as the Assegai fern, is a species of fern that is native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris afra include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and alleviating respiratory issues such as asthma and bronchitis. Thelypteris afra can be prepared as a decoction or infusion to be used as a herbal remedy, and its extracts have also been studied for their potential use in modern medicine.
